PORT.description: Port Beszel listens on (default: 8090, hardcoded upstream). Must match Railway's PORT.

APP_URL.description: Public URL of your Beszel hub (e.g., https://your-app.up.railway.app). Used for links in emails and notifications.

AUTO_LOGIN.description: Email of a user to auto-authenticate (skip login page). Leave empty to require login.

DISABLE_PASSWORD_AUTH.description: Set to true to disable password auth and use OAuth/OIDC only.
